title: CODE-NUBAID/Financial-Document-RAG-Assistant
summary: CODE-NUBAID/Financial-Document-RAG-Assistant 是一个生产级别的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，允许用户上传任何发票或财务PDF文件，并对其提出自然语言问题，所有答案均来自文档，确保准确性。该系统采用先进的模型训练和推理技术，结合向量索引和缓存机制，优化了性能和并发处理，适用于分布式架构和微服务环境。
description: A production-quality Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system that lets you upload any invoice or financial PDF and ask natural language questions about it — answered only from the document, never hallucinated.
